title: Eldritch End Etyr Blocks Recipe Fix
description: Adds Recipes for all 4 Etyr Blocks found in Eldritch end
body:
This Datapack adds the Following Recipes to any Modpack that uses Eldritch end:
!(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c159e303337c3b8b651e60a4933a011b991239b5.png)

!(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a6ad9244417543d047ef2533058f3636b9bd7a1.png)

!(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ed8777a9c3e955ca01a694c11fff0a5f59e48b7.png)

!(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/841bb9b8cb954003f95e4a11b5d4e20bcdb42b6a.png)

Whilst this datapack does nothing on its own, you will need a way to load it such as paxi or kubejs
